metadata.seed: Why live without her? Sure, I can live without her. But I just don't want to. She is the only one I'll ever truly love. What's the point if I'll never love another the same way? Oneitis? Maybe. But I've met girls after her. None interest me enough to even bother. She is just so special to me...

patient.query: Why live without her? Sure, I can live without her. But I just don't want to. She is the only one I'll ever truly love. What's the point if I'll never love another the same way? Oneitis? Maybe. But I've met girls after her. None interest me enough to even bother. She is just so special to me...

automatic_thoughts: I'll never love another the same way
she is just so special to me

neutral: Ability to resist obsessional thoughts (observable entity)

llm_response.response: It sounds like you're carrying a lot of pain right now, and it's completely understandable why you'd feel that way. I want to help you explore these thoughts a bit more gently.

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds like you're carrying a lot of pain right now, and it's completely understandable why you'd feel that way. I want to help you explore these thoughts a bit more gently.

socratic_questioning.response:
FINAL RESPONSE:
<therapist message>
That sounds really difficult. When you say you don't want to live without her, but also don't see the point in pursuing others, what makes you feel like no one else could ever compare to her?

alternative_perspective.response: It sounds like you're feeling really stuck in this way. Have you ever thought about what a close friend might say if they heard how you feel about her?

safety_check.response: I hear how much pain this is causing you, and it's completely understandable to feel this way. When you said that, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
